title: Naked & Bound
description: A hardcore co-op survival game mode where all players share one health pool and must survive together.
body:
# Naked & Bound
**Naked & Bound** is a hardcore cooperative survival game mode for Minecraft where **all players share one health pool**.  
Every hit hurts everyone. Every heal helps everyone.  
Your goal is simple: **survive together and complete a shared task before your hearts hit zero**.

This plugin is designed for **Paper / Purpur servers** and focuses on fairness, clarity, and strong game feedback.

---

## 🔥 Core Gameplay

- ❤️ **Shared Health Pool**
  - All survival players are bound to a single pool of hearts
  - Damage taken by one player affects everyone
  - Healing restores shared health for the whole group

- ⏱️ **Day-Based Progression**
  - The game runs in structured days
  - At the end of each day, the game **fully freezes**
  - A daily recap is shown before the next day begins

- 🧠 **Team Strategy Required**
  - Reckless play can end the run instantly
  - Healing must be timed carefully
  - Players must protect each other to survive

---

## ⚡ Optional Features

Customize your challenge by enabling **any combination** of these features:

### 💪 **Stamina System**
- Inventory weight affects movement
- Sprint and jump costs increase with heavy items
- Strategic inventory management required
- Fully configurable weight values

### 🔧 **Decay System**
- Equipment deteriorates over time
- Armor and tools lose durability even when idle
- Constant resource management pressure
- Configurable decay rates

### 🎲 **Wildcard System**
- Daily random modifiers shake up gameplay
- Buffs, debuffs, and chaotic effects
- Adapt your strategy each day
- Examples: double damage, healing restrictions, speed boosts

**Mix and match** — enable any, all, or none for your perfect difficulty level.

---

## 🎯 Missions & Objectives

At the start of each run, a **random task** is chosen from `tasks.yml`:

**Boss Battles:** Kill the Ender Dragon, Defeat a Wither, Defeat an Elder Guardian

**Exploration:** Clear an Ancient City, Complete a Raid

**Collection:** Collect rare items, Gather specific resources

**Fully customizable** — create your own tasks in `tasks.yml`.

Complete the task to **win** — lose all hearts to **fail**.

---

## 📊 Tracking & Stats

Comprehensive stat tracking for every run:
- Damage taken and hearts restored per player
- Daily vs total statistics
- Damage causes breakdown
- No-damage streak tracking

### Daily Recap
- Top contributors (damage taken & healing)
- Heart changes for the day
- Damage causes summary

### Endgame MVP Summary
- Least damage taken
- Most hearts restored
- Most net damage
- Top damage cause
- Total time survived

---

## 🖥️ Interactive GUI

Navigate everything through an **in-game GUI** (`/naked`):
- Toggle features (Stamina, Decay, Wildcard)
- View current task and progress
- Access stats and game controls

---

## 🍎 Healing & Item Rules

- Golden Apples restore shared health
- Healing blocked if it would be wasted
- Regeneration, absorption, and beacon effects stripped
- Optional start-of-game golden apple

---

## ❄️ True Game Freezing

When the game is paused or a day ends:
- World time freezes
- Mob AI freezes
- Players locked in place

---

## ⚙️ Highly Configurable

Two configuration files for complete control:

**config.yml** — Core settings:
- Health calculation (hearts per player)
- BossBar toggle
- Feedback and announcements
- Feature-specific settings (Stamina weights, Decay rates, Wildcard effects)
- Join-lock, MOTD, crafting restrictions
- Automatic config migration preserves your settings

**tasks.yml** — Mission management:
- Enable/disable individual tasks
- Customize task descriptions
- Add your own custom objectives

---

## 🎮 Commands

**Admin Commands:**
- `/naked start` — Start a new game
- `/naked pause` / `/naked resume` — Pause/resume gameplay
- `/naked freeze` / `/naked unfreeze` — Freeze/unfreeze the world
- `/naked stats` — View detailed statistics
- `/naked completed` — Mark task as completed
- `/naked endgame` — End the current game
- `/naked` — Open the interactive GUI

**Player Commands:**
- `/naked` — View game status (read-only without admin permission)

---

## 🧱 Server Requirements

**Required:**
- Paper or Purpur
- Minecraft **1.21.x+**

---

## 🎮 Who Is This For?

Naked & Bound is perfect for:
- Hardcore SMPs
- Content creators looking for intense co-op content
- Small groups wanting high-stakes survival challenges
- Servers that want a fresh, customizable survival mode

If one player messes up... everyone pays.

If you're a content creator and publish content using the plugin, I'd love to hear about it!

---

## ❤️ Author

Developed by **ShantekMC**  
Support development on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/shantek

---

Good luck.  
You're going to need it.
